title: Inventory Equilibrium Scout
problem_or_desire: Balancing low inventory costs with delivery lead time requirements across geographic regions.
core_concept: Self-modifying replenishment rules based on localized shipping cost fluctuations.
proposed_approach: Connecting historical fulfillment throughput with carrier pricing scrapers to update ERP buffer stocks automatically.
prototype_scope: Agent capable of updating buffer stock values in one simulated cloud-based inventory system.

title: Home Maintenance Tracker
problem_or_desire: Forgetting routine maintenance tasks that lead to expensive repairs.
core_concept: A predictive maintenance schedule based on home appliance age and type.
proposed_approach: A web app that generates a custom calendar of maintenance tasks based on a user-inputted home profile.
prototype_scope: A form to input home details and a generated 12-month maintenance checklist.

title: Pantry Potioneer
target_user: Home cooks trying to minimize food waste
problem_or_desire: Managing quickly expiring ingredients that end up in the trash
core_concept: An RPG fantasy loop where monsters representing hunger levels and potion recipes are dynamically generated based on manual pantry inventory scanning.
proposed_approach: Camera-vision OCR scanning that maps specific pantry items to equipment traits (e.g., milk is defensive, spice is offensive) to fend off pantry chaos creatures.
prototype_scope: Inventory scanner integration processing ten basic produce items as offensive ability slots.

title: High-Efficiency Batch Prep Lockers
target_user: Early-career shift workers in transit corridors
problem_or_desire: No time to properly nutritious pre-prepped daily sustenance between rigid shift boundaries
core_concept: Automated kiosk network stocked by local morning-prep professional chef kitchens
proposed_approach: Time-sensitive temperature kiosks near train hubs that enable rapid mobile code retrieval of bulk caloric daily prep portions
prototype_scope: Deployment of three climate controlled modular locker cabinets dispensing pre-prepped heat-or-eat nutritious vegetable pods near a single bus hub

title: Tech Stacks Lifecycle Steward
problem_or_desire: Underutilized 'seat licenses' contributing to phantom software spending.
core_concept: Cross-referencing user access logs with license assignments to identify unused seats.
proposed_approach: A tool that ingests exported CSVs from SSO and SaaS platforms to identify inactive users.
prototype_scope: A script that takes two CSV files (user list and access logs) and outputs a list of potential license reclamation candidates. | Define CSV schema for SSO/SaaS exports; Develop matching logic; Build report generator; Test with synthetic data

title: Polyglot Plaza
problem_or_desire: Low retention rates caused by repetitive and dry grammar exercises
core_concept: Contextual language learning through inventory management and NPC interaction.
proposed_approach: A single-player text-based adventure where players must translate simple phrases to trade items with static NPCs.
prototype_scope: A market vendor scene with one bartering minigame requiring translation of three specific phrases. | Design three simple bartering scenarios; Implement basic text input and validation logic; Create static NPC dialogue trees

title: Remote Cultural Consultant Tooling
problem_or_desire: Churn due to poor communication onboarding in distributed digital agencies
core_concept: Interactive, asynchronous onboarding playbooks for remote teams.
proposed_approach: A service providing modular, interactive PDF/Notion playbooks for remote team onboarding.
prototype_scope: Three modular playbooks delivered as interactive documents. | Design 3 modular playbooks.; Format as interactive documents.; Test with 3 remote startups.; Gather feedback on usability.

title: BeatRoute Runner
problem_or_desire: Difficulty maintaining consistent pacing during endurance training
core_concept: Rhythm-action game where the user's running speed acts as the beat matcher for an procedurally generated audio experience.
proposed_approach: Use the device accelerometer to sync game events to cadence, where reaching cadence milestones unlocks faster melodic overlays in a song soundtrack.
prototype_scope: A treadmill-focused build enabling one pre-selected electronic music track where speed matches track elements.

title: Regulatory Compliance Monitor
problem_or_desire: Keeping up with rapidly changing regional financial regulations and updating internal policy documents.
core_concept: An agent that monitors regulatory news feeds and maps changes to internal policy documentation.
proposed_approach: Semantic analysis of regulatory updates compared against a vector database of company policies.
prototype_scope: A dashboard that highlights three specific policy sections that need review based on a provided regulatory update text.

title: Dream Journal Dungeon
problem_or_desire: Difficulty remembering and organizing dream content
core_concept: A dungeon crawler where the layout and enemies are procedurally generated from text input of dream journals
proposed_approach: Use natural language processing to extract keywords from user-inputted text to determine dungeon themes and enemy types
prototype_scope: A text input field that generates a simple 2D room layout based on three keywords
